name: Hunt & Henriques
description_short: Hunt & Henriques is a credit repair provider based in San Jose, California. Rated 1.4/5 with 105 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Hunt & Henriques is a credit repair provider serving clients in San Jose, California. With 105 Google reviews and a 1.4/5.0 rating, Hunt & Henriques has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a attorney, Hunt & Henriques provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in San Jose, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Hunt & Henriques operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the San Jose, California area who are considering Hunt & Henriques should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
